purpose: Curated demo scenarios for the quality-comparison proposal draft MVP.
corpus_prerequisite: Fresh checkouts do not include real proposal documents. Upload sanitized real proposal files or create local synthetic files matching docs/proposal-demo.md before running these scenarios.

scenarios.title: Public SI modernization proposal
scenarios.query: 교육청 노후 업무시스템 고도화 사업 제안서의 추진전략, 구현방안, 일정/리스크 섹션 초안을 작성해줘.
expected_response_checks: response includes draft content, cited sources, variants/config labels, warnings, and quality summary
draft content includes proposal-style sections
sources cite file/page/section metadata
variant labels distinguish generation or rerank configuration
warnings call out missing budget/staffing/client-specific constraints when absent
quality summary states whether compared variants share the same candidate identity

scenarios.title: LMS platform build proposal
scenarios.query: 공공기관 이러닝 플랫폼 구축 제안서의 사업 이해, 제안 접근방안, 운영 지원 방안을 초안으로 작성해줘.
expected_response_checks: response includes draft content, cited sources, variants/config labels, warnings, and quality summary
draft covers business understanding, approach, implementation, operation, risks, and evidence gaps
sources include LMS or public SI evidence
warnings mention unverified SLA/license/integration constraints when absent
quality summary identifies strongest evidence sections

scenarios.title: Smart factory AI predictive maintenance proposal
scenarios.query: 제조 설비 예측정비 AI PoC 제안서 초안을 작성하고 데이터 수집, 모델 운영, 현장 적용 리스크를 정리해줘.
expected_response_checks: response includes draft content, cited sources, variants/config labels, warnings, and quality summary
admin or manufacturing-scoped user gets manufacturing evidence
public-team non-admin user cannot widen scope to 제조DX팀
sources preserve retrieval_score/rerank_score semantics
quality summary explains any no-results caused by department scope

scenarios.title: Public cloud migration proposal
scenarios.query: 공공기관 클라우드 전환 사업 제안서의 전환 전략, 보안/DR, 비용 최적화, 단계별 이행계획 초안을 작성해줘.
expected_response_checks: response includes draft content, cited sources, variants/config labels, warnings, and quality summary
draft covers migration waves, security/DR, cost, schedule, and risks
sources include cloud migration evidence
warnings call out unverified provider/system-inventory/regulatory details
quality summary does not rank raw scores from incompatible candidate sets

scenarios.title: Healthcare data platform no-results and scope check
scenarios.query: 병원 데이터 플랫폼 제안서의 개인정보 보호, 데이터 거버넌스, 분석 포털 구축 방안을 초안으로 작성해줘.
expected_response_checks: response includes draft content, cited sources, variants/config labels, warnings, and quality summary
admin or healthcare-scoped user can retrieve healthcare evidence
public-team non-admin user receives no widened healthcare scope
no-results response uses the deterministic message when no permitted evidence exists
no-results response has empty sources and no hallucinated draft
quality summary explains that no draft was generated without evidence
